hooks.command: node -e "const{execFileSync:xf,execSync:xs}=require('child_process'),{existsSync:ex,appendFileSync:af}=require('fs'),{homedir:hd,platform:pf}=require('os'),{join:j,dirname:dn}=require('path'),w=pf()==='win32',h=hd(),ef=process.env.CLAUDE_ENV_FILE||'';function fb(n){try{return xf(w?'where':'which',[n],{encoding:'utf8',timeout:5e3}).trim().split('\n')[0]}catch{}for(const d of[j(h,'.local','bin'),j(h,'.uv','bin'),...(w?[j(h,'AppData','Roaming','Python','Scripts')]:[])]) {const c=j(d,w?n+'.exe':n);if(ex(c))return c}return null}function gv(b){try{return xf(b,['--version'],{encoding:'utf8',timeout:5e3}).trim()}catch{return'unknown'}}function ti(){for(const m of[{t:'uv',c:'uv tool install limacharlie'},{t:'pipx',c:'pipx install limacharlie'},{t:'pip',c:'pip install --user limacharlie'},{t:'pip3',c:'pip3 install --user limacharlie'}]){if(!fb(m.t))continue;try{xs(m.c,{encoding:'utf8',timeout:12e4,stdio:'pipe'});const b=fb('limacharlie');if(b)return{method:m.t,bin:b}}catch{}}return null}function ep(bp){if(!ef||!bp)return;const d=dn(bp);if(!(process.env.PATH||'').split(w?';':':').includes(d))af(ef,'export PATH=\"'+d+':$PATH\"\n')}function out(sm,ctx){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'SessionStart',additionalContext:ctx},...(sm?{systemMessage:sm}:{})}))}let b=fb('limacharlie');if(b){ep(b);out('','limacharlie CLI is available ('+gv(b)+').');process.exit(0)}const py=fb('python3')||fb('python');if(!py){out('\x1b[33m[lc-essentials] Python 3 not found. Install Python 3.9+ then run: pip install limacharlie\x1b[0m','ERROR: limacharlie CLI is NOT installed. Python 3 is not available.
